race.comment: HUMBLE HERO (1) returns from a layoff of five months. Scored over 1200m at Rockhampton to launch the last campaign. Has since switched to the Darryl Johnston yard and is capable of playing a major role. SEEYA LATER GATER (3) finished fifth over 1640m at Roma at his most recent appearance on December 6. Worth plenty of thought. SPITZBERG (4) has not appeared since he finished seventh over 1212m at Bundaberg on January 31. Has found the right race and is worth including in the multiples. SONIC ARROW (11) finished 9 lengths off the winner last start at Gold Coast Poly. Finds a suitable race and can contest for a place.
